column1: # RustyNES Game Genie code-name database (v1.2.0 Workstream D, D3).
# A ROM-indexed list of well-known Game Genie codes drawn from the public
# Galoob code books and the community Game Genie code lists (the codes and the
# effect names are factual/functional descriptions, not Nintendo program code).
# RustyNES consumes this ENTIRELY in the frontend: the cheat panel shows the
# codes that match the loaded ROM as a pick-list; selecting one feeds the
# Format (tab-separated; '#' lines and blank lines are comments):
# CRC32 is the "ROM CRC" of PRG-ROM + CHR-ROM with the 16-byte iNES header (and
# any 512-byte trainer) excluded — the same key `crate::game_db::rom_crc32`
# computes, so a loaded ROM resolves its codes by CRC. Multiple rows may share a
# CRC (a game has several codes). Codes are validated through
# `GenieCode::new` before being offered, so a malformed row is silently dropped.
# This file is committed (CC0-style factual data; small) and compiled in via
# `include_str!`. Keep it modest — it ships in the binary AND the wasm bundle.
# Commercial Nintendo ROMs are NEVER committed; only the codes are.
# The Legend of Zelda (USA) — PRG+CHR CRC 0xD7AE93DF
